column1: # - native-supported: scripts/vaisc must build/run value-correct and match Legacy oracle.
# - bootstrap-only: Legacy oracle must stay value-correct; native front must reject it for now.
# - tracked: Legacy oracle must stay value-correct; native is known not to be value-correct yet.
# Keep this list small and intentional. Add examples here when their status is
# clear enough to protect in scripts/test-vaisc-parity.sh.

column3: List literal and sum remain Legacy bootstrap-only.
Struct field access remains Legacy bootstrap-only.
Print/interpolation remains Legacy bootstrap-only in vaisc front.
Recursive AST enum remains Legacy bootstrap-only.
Closure return ABI remains Legacy bootstrap-only.
Full self-host compiler remains covered by the long bootstrap gate.
Native emits invalid IR for bitnot builtin shape.
Native emits invalid IR for bitwise builtin shape.
Native emits invalid IR for conversion builtin shape.
Native front accepts but generic fn lowers incorrectly.
Native front accepts but string equality lowers invalid IR.
Native front accepts but char operation lowers invalid IR.
